allegro.connectDescription: Sign in with your Allegro account to manage orders and offers.
allegro.connectErrorAuth: Allegro returned an authorization error. Please try again.
allegro.connectErrorCallback: Invalid callback parameters. Please try connecting again.
allegro.connectErrorGeneric: Something went wrong while connecting to Allegro.
allegro.connectErrorState: Your session expired. Please try connecting again.
allegro.connectErrorToken: We couldn't complete the Allegro token exchange.
allegro.connectSuccessDescription: Your Allegro account is now connected.
allegro.fulfillmentManagedDescription: This imported order keeps delivery data in Konfi, but parcel booking and shipment handling stay in Allegro.
allegro.importMissingChannelDescription: Select a channel before importing an Allegro order.
allegro.importMissingFallbackDescription: The import draft is ready, but choose a product for each imported line item before saving, or configure a default Allegro import product in settings.
allegro.importMissingUserDescription: Sign in again before importing an Allegro order.
allegro.importPrepareErrorDescription: We couldn't prepare the Allegro order for import. Try again.

orders.allegroFulfilledReadonly: Status and shipping are managed by Allegro.
orders.emptyDescription: No orders found on your Allegro account.
orders.invoiceNoticeDescription: Moving an Allegro order to in progress creates the Allegro invoice automatically. Konfi should create only receipts for imported Allegro orders.
orders.noSearchResultsDescription: Clear the search phrase or refresh with different filters.
orders.processingInvoiceNotice: Allegro will create the invoice after the order is moved to in progress. Create only the receipt in Konfi if needed.
orders.statusUpdateErrorDescription: Refresh the order list and try again. Allegro may have newer order data.
orders.statusUpdatePartialErrorTitle: Some Allegro statuses were not updated

export.categoryLoadError: Failed to load Allegro category parameters.
export.categoryRequiredDescription: Choose an Allegro category before continuing.
export.categorySearchPlaceholder: Type a product or category phrase…
export.categorySearchTooShortDescription: Type at least 2 characters to search Allegro categories.
export.configurationDescription: Add one concrete configuration at a time. The wizard never expands every product permutation automatically.
export.description: Build curated Allegro offers from exact Konfi configurations, then publish them to the connected Allegro account.
export.deliveryTimeDaysHelp: Enter days. The offer is sent to Allegro as {{duration}}.
export.duplicateConfigurationDescription: This exact configuration is already in the preview.
export.emptyPreview: No configurations added yet. The generated offer count is 0.
export.allegroDescriptionHtmlHelp: Allowed Allegro tags: h1, h2, p, ul, ol, li, b. Images are still added from product files.
export.allegroDescriptionHtmlPlaceholder: Converted Allegro description will appear here and can be edited before publication.
export.gpsrGenerateErrorDescription: Failed to generate GPSR safety information.
export.gpsrGenerateSuccessDescription: Review the generated safety information before publishing.
export.gpsrSafetyInformationPlaceholder: Add safety information for this exact Allegro offer before publishing.
export.massExportGuardDescription: This preview has more than 10 offers. Reduce the curated list before enabling publish.
export.pageCountInvalidDescription: Enter a page count between {{minimum}} and {{maximum}} using step {{step}}.
export.pageCountRequiredDescription: Enter a page count for this export configuration.
export.previewDescription: Review generated titles, parameters, prices, and unresolved values before publishing to Allegro.
export.previewGuaranteeValue: Preview of the offer that will be published to Allegro.
export.publishErrorDescription: Allegro rejected the publication request. Check seller settings and required category parameters.
export.publishDisabledDescription: Enable Allegro offer publication in Allegro settings before publishing.
export.publishMissingProducerDescription: Select a responsible producer in Allegro settings before publishing.
export.publishMissingPriceDescription: Resolve the price preview before publishing this offer.
export.publishMissingSafetyDescription: Fill or generate GPSR safety information for every offer before publishing.
export.publishSuccessDescription: {{count}} Allegro offer was published or updated successfully.
export.parameterSearchHint: No results. Type to narrow available values.
export.selectProductPrompt: Select a product to configure export offers.
export.storedOffersDeleteError: Failed to remove saved Allegro offer.
export.storedOffersLoadError: Failed to load saved Allegro offers.
export.title: Product Export
export.unmappedWarning: Some values have no matching Allegro parameter and will only be represented in title or description.
export.volumeRequiredDescription: Choose a quantity before adding the configuration.

settings.clearedDescription: Allegro import will fall back to automatic product matching again.
settings.clearError: Failed to clear Allegro import settings.
settings.defaultProductDescription: Pick a SINGLE product with custom price enabled. Allegro imports will keep the Allegro item name and use the Allegro price as custom price on this product.
settings.handlingTimeHelp: ISO 8601 duration accepted by Allegro, for example P3D.
settings.invalidProductDescription: Choose a SINGLE product with custom price enabled to avoid Allegro import item loading issues.
settings.loadError: Failed to load Allegro import settings.
settings.noResultsDescription: No active products matched your search. Try a different phrase.
settings.noResultsHint: No products found for this search yet.
settings.noSavedProduct: No default Allegro import product configured yet.
settings.publicationDescription: Configure seller services used by Allegro when Konfi publishes or updates product offers.
settings.publicationConnectDescription: Sign in with Allegro before loading seller shipping and warranty settings.
settings.publicationOptionsLoadError: Failed to load Allegro seller settings from Allegro.
settings.publicationSaveError: Failed to save Allegro publication settings.
settings.publicationSavedDescription: Allegro export will use these seller settings when publishing offers.
settings.responsibleProducerHelp: Responsible producer configured in the Allegro seller account.
settings.safetyInformationHelp: Sent to Allegro as productSet safety information text.
settings.safetyInformationPlaceholder: Describe product safety warnings and instructions required by Allegro GPSR.
settings.savedDescription: Imported Allegro items will now use this product by default.
settings.saveError: Failed to save Allegro import settings.
settings.searchTooShortDescription: Type at least 2 characters to search products.
settings.shippingRatesIdHelp: Allegro delivery price list used for published offers.
settings.title: Allegro settings

allegro.title: Allegro
